Weight Loss

Clinically supervised weight management

A personalized approach to weight loss built around your health history, realistic goals, and real provider oversight — including GLP-1 receptor agonist evaluation for eligible patients.

Book a Visit
Our Approach

A structured path to your goals

Three phases designed to evaluate, treat, and monitor your progress with clinical oversight at every step.

1

Initial Evaluation

  • ● Comprehensive health history review including conditions, medications, and labs
  • ● Realistic goal-setting based on your individual health profile
  • ● Provider consultation discussing clinical options
2

Medication-Assisted Weight Loss

  • ● GLP-1 receptor agonist evaluation for eligible patients
  • ● Prescription management with dosing oversight and adjustments
  • ● Ongoing provider review for effectiveness and side effects
3

Ongoing Monitoring

  • ● Scheduled progress check-ins with your provider
  • ● Plan adjustments based on your response and goals
  • ● Periodic lab monitoring of metabolic markers
Common Questions

What to expect

Am I eligible for GLP-1 medication?
Eligibility is determined on a case-by-case basis during your initial evaluation. Your provider will review your health history, current medications, and goals to determine if GLP-1 therapy is appropriate for you.
Do I need a referral?
No referral is needed. You can book directly through our patient portal.
How often are follow-up visits?
Follow-up frequency depends on your treatment type and how you're responding. Your provider will set a schedule that works for your plan.
Are lab costs included in the visit fee?
Lab costs are separate from visit fees. Your provider will discuss what labs are needed and approximate costs during your visit.
Can this integrate with my primary care?
Absolutely. If you're also a primary care patient with MBS Medical, your weight loss program is managed alongside your other conditions by the same provider.

Take the first step

Book your initial evaluation and start working with a provider who builds a plan around your goals.
